name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.RollDownStairsHelper.AsymmetricalLegs
summary: 0 is no leg asymmetry in 'foetal' position.  greater than 0 a asymmetricalLegs-rand(30%), added/minus each joint of the legs in radians.  Random number changes about once every roll.  0.4 gives a lot of asymmetry.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = -1.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
